Long ago, it is said that the White Drag:
Long ago, it is said that the White Dragon 
descended upon the peak of Volden 
and blessed this land. 
There is a legend that during that time, 
the spring of the fountain began to flow.
May the blessings of The White Dragon an:
May the blessings of The White Dragon 

and Lestania be upon you.
We use the scent of herbs and medicinal:
We use the scent of herbs and medicinal flowers.
Please enjoy the soothing aroma along 
with the floating petals for an 
exquisite sense of relaxation.
Here, we have prepared a perfect drink f:
Here, we have prepared a perfect drink 

for the "Spring of Abundance".
Please feel free to try it.
The Liberation Army successfully recaptu:
The Liberation Army successfully recaptured
Fort Thines. However, due to the occupation
by the Demon Army, the Dining Hall had turned
into a pile of rubble, losing all function.

With food running out, the cook Carrie
stood alone in the desolate dining hall,
on the brink of despair.

Will there be any way to save her
in such a situation?
The Liberation Army succeeded\r\nin reta:
The Liberation Army succeeded in 
retaking Lookout Castle.
However, the remnants of the Demon Army
escaped into the outer defense zone of the castle
and continue to hold their ground.

It's believed that the Liberation Army
could not possibly hold the castle,
as they could not allocate sufficient forces
for its defense. There is, however, one person
who can break through such a situation;
A genius staff officer named Sonel,
a member of the Liberation Army.

The Arisen who played a significant role
in the recapture of Lookout Castle will join him
on this "impossible mission".
Royal Capital Megado successfully recapt:
Royal Capital Megado has been successfully 
recaptured by the Liberation Army.

However, the citizens of Megado still live in fear
of the tyrannical rule of their oppressors,
and an unsettling atmosphere lingers in the city.

In secret opposition to this ruler, a
resistance group has risen, led by a manipulative
figure known as "Mephis"."

To reclaim true peace for the people of Megado,
the Arisen join forces with them, and together,
they venture into the depths of darkness.
Knowing the darkness of Megado,\r\nA mys:
A mysterious and influential
figure who knows of the 
darkness lurking within Megado.
